children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: For purposes of title 26, gain or loss from the sale or exchange of any applicable preferred stock by any applicable financial institution shall be treated as ordinary income or loss.

children.label: A
children.text: the Federal National Mortgage Association, established pursuant to the Federal National Mortgage Association Charter Act ( et seq.), or12 U.S.C. 1716

children.label: B
children.text: the Federal Home Loan Mortgage Corporation, established pursuant to the Federal Home Loan Mortgage Corporation Act ( et seq.), and12 U.S.C. 1451

children.label: A
children.text: was held by the applicable financial institution on , orSeptember 6, 2008

children.label: B
children.text: was sold or exchanged by the applicable financial institution on or after , and before .January 1, 2008September 7, 2008

children.label: A
children.text: a financial institution referred to in , orsection 582(c)(2) of title 26

children.label: B
children.text: a depository institution holding company (as defined in ).section 1813(w)(1) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: a sale or exchange described in subsection (b)(2)(B), an entity shall be treated as an applicable financial institution only if it was an entity described in subparagraph (A) or (B) of paragraph (1) at the time of the sale or exchange, and

children.label: B
children.text: a sale or exchange after , of preferred stock described in subsection (b)(2)(A), an entity shall be treated as an applicable financial institution only if it was an entity described in subparagraph (A) or (B) of paragraph (1) at all times during the period beginning on , and ending on the date of the sale or exchange of the preferred stock.September 6, 2008September 6, 2008

children.heading: Special rule for certain property not held onSeptember 6, 2008
children.label: d Special rule for certain property not held onSeptember 6, 2008

children.text: an applicable financial institution sells or exchanges applicable preferred stock after , which the applicable financial institution did not hold on such date, but the basis of which in the hands of the applicable financial institution at the time of the sale or exchange is the same as the basis in the hands of the person which held such stock on such date, orSeptember 6, 2008

children.label: A
children.text: held such stock on , and later sold or exchanged such stock, orSeptember 6, 2008

children.label: B
children.text: sold or exchanged such stock during the period described in subsection (b)(2)(B).

children.heading: Regulatory authority
children.label: e Regulatory authority
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury or the Secretary’s delegate may prescribe such guidance, rules, or regulations as are necessary to carry out the purposes of this section.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: f Effective date
children.text: This section shall apply to sales or exchanges occurring after , in taxable years ending after such date.December 31, 2007
